creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236788
Patch for autoconf-archive

Align DISTVERSION to match upstream

Changelog:
https://git.savannah.nongnu.org/cgit/autoconf-archive.git/tree/NEWS?h=v2022.09.03

Tested with following users in Poudriere:
devel/gnome-common
devel/libspice-server
devel/ticcutils
emulators/nestopia
games/7kaa
graphics/scrot
mail/openarc
net-im/profanity
security/pkcs11-tools
sysutils/fusefs-simple-mtpfs
sysutils/nix
textproc/libfolia
textproc/ucto
www/dtse
